title: batanthes longiflora
intro: Batanthes longiflora, also known as the Yellowhead or Long-flowered Batanthes, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and bronchodilator properties. Batanthes longiflora can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
